is_defined: {property} should not be null or undefined
is_in: {property} must be one of the following values: {constraints.0}
is_not_in: {property} should not be one of the following values: {constraints.0}
max: {property} with value: "{value}" needs to be less than or equal to {constraints.0}
min: {property} with value: "{value}" needs to be at least {constraints.0}
is_alphanumeric: {property} must contain only letters and numbers
is_decimal: {property} must be a valid decimal number
is_credit_card: {property} must be a valid credit card number
is_currency: {property} must be a valid currency amount
is_fqdn: {property} must be a valid domain name
is_variable_width: {property} must contain a mixture of full and half-width characters
is_hex_color: {property} must be a valid hex color
is_hexadecimal: {property} must be a valid hexadecimal number
is_mac_address: {property} must be a valid MAC address
is_ip: {property} must be a valid IP address
is_iso8601: {property} must be a valid ISO 8601 date string
is_json: {property} must be a valid json string
is_jwt: {property} must be a valid jwt string
is_mobile_phone: {property} must be a valid mobile phone number
is_iso31661_alpha2: {property} must be a valid ISO31661 alpha2 code
is_iso31661_alpha3: {property} must be a valid ISO31661 alpha3 code
is_multibyte: {property} must contain one or more multibyte chars
is_surrogate_pair: {property} must contain any surrogate pairs chars
is_firebase_push_id: {property} must be a Firebase Push Id
max_length: {property} must be shorter than or equal to {constraints.0} characters
min_length: {property} must be longer than or equal to {constraints.0} characters
is_phone_number: {property} must be a valid phone number
is_military_time: {property} must be a valid representation of military time
is_hash: {property} must be a hash of type {constraints.0}
is_date_string: {property} must be a valid ISO 8601 date string
is_bic: {property} must be a valid BIC or SWIFT code
is_btc_address: {property} must be a valid BTC address
is_data_uri: {property} must be a valid data uri format
is_ethereum_address: {property} must be a valid Ethereum address
is_hsl: {property} must be a valid HSL color
is_identity_card: {property} must be a valid identity card number
is_magnet_uri: {property} must be a valid magnet uri format
is_mime_type: {property} must be a valid MIME type format
is_octal: {property} must be a valid octal number
is_passport_number: {property} must be a valid passport number
is_postal_code: {property} must be a valid postal code
is_rfc3339: {property} must be a valid RFC 3339 date string
is_rgb_color: {property} must be a valid RGB color
is_sem_ver: {property} must be a Semantic Versioning Specification
is_time_zone: {property} must be a valid IANA time-zone
is_tax_id: {property} must be a valid tax ID
is_iso4217_currency_code: {property} must be a valid ISO4217 currency code
is_number: {property} must be a number conforming to the specified constraints
is_enum: {property} must be one of the following values: {constraints.0}
array_max_size: {property} must contain not more than {constraints.0} elements
validate_nested: {property} must be a valid nested object
slug_category_format: {property} must contain only lowercase English letters, numbers, and hyphens (e.g., skin-care)
password_week: Password is too weak. Must include uppercase, lowercase, and numbers.
time_format: {property} must be in HH:mm or HH:mm:ss format
egyptian_mobile: {property} must be an Egyptian mobile number starting with 010, 011, 012, or 015 and contain 11 digits
slug_product_format: {property} must contain only lowercase English letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens (e.g., product-name-101)
sku_format: {property} must contain only English letters, numbers, and hyphens
exactly_one_trigger_node: Flow must have exactly one trigger node. Found {count}.
trigger_cannot_have_incoming_edges: Trigger node cannot have incoming edges.
invalid_source_handle: Invalid sourceHandle "{sourceHandle}" for node "{source}". Expected one of: {expectedBranches}
flow_not_fully_connected: Flow graph is not fully connected from the trigger node.
flow_circular_reference: Flow graph contains a circular reference (cycle).
valid_date_range: activeFrom must be before or equal to activeUntil
valid_amount_range: minAmount must be less than or equal to maxAmount
